expectations.text: Output contains at least 10 distinct hooks
No hooks start with 'Are you...' (tired generic AI ad opener)
expectations.evidence: none of the banned patterns appeared
none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Hooks include concrete specifics (numbers, names, objects, situations) not vague claims
expectations.evidence: 3:47am, seventeen tabs, email from Tuesday, melatonin/magnesium/tea/weighted blanket list

expectations.text: Output uses VARIETY of psychological trigger types (not all the same category)
expectations.evidence: Mix of scene, metaphor, physiology reframe, contrast, betrayal frame, inventory

expectations.text: Hooks feel native to the given persona's voice/context (not generic ad copy)
expectations.evidence: Knowledge-worker cues (tabs, email from Tuesday, app), parent cue (kids sleep through the night)

expectations.text: Multiple hooks specifically reference the 3am-waking pattern (not generic 'bad sleep')
Hooks SHOW the pain (scene, moment, sensation) rather than TELLING it ('you're tired')
expectations.evidence: Hook 1 shows scene, 2 shows tab-mind, 6 shows listening to house, 10 names panic-attack sensation
